creator: gahr@gahr.ch
text:
Fixed stupid quote error..
attaching as inline...

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	linux-netscape-navigator
#	linux-netscape-navigator/files
#	linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.desktop.in
#	linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.in
#	linux-netscape-navigator/Makefile
#	linux-netscape-navigator/distinfo
#	linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-descr
#	linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-plist
#
echo c - linux-netscape-navigator
mkdir -p linux-netscape-navigator > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - linux-netscape-navigator/files
mkdir -p linux-netscape-navigator/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.desktop.in
sed 's/^X//'
>linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.desktop.in <<
'END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.desktop.in'
X[Desktop Entry]
XEncoding=UTF-8
XName=Netscape Navigator Web Browser (Linux)
XExec=linux-firefox %U
XIcon=%%PREFIX%%/lib/%%APP_NAME%%/chrome/icons/default/default.xpm
XStartupNotify=false
XTerminal=false
XType=Application
XCategories=Application;Network;
XMimeType=text/html;text/xml;application/xhtml+xml;
END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.desktop.in
echo x - linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.in
sed 's/^X//' >linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.in
<< 'END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.in'
X#!/bin/sh
Xexec %%PREFIX%%/lib/linux-netscape-navigator/navigator "$@"
END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/files/linux-netscape-navigator.in
echo x - linux-netscape-navigator/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >linux-netscape-navigator/Makefile <<
'END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:  netscape-navigator
X# Date created:        17 October 2007
X# Whom:                Pietro Cerutti (gahr@gahr.ch)
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=	netscape-navigator
XPORTVERSION=	9.0
XCATEGORIES=	www linux
XMASTER_SITES=
http://ftp.netscape.com/pub/netscape9/en-US/${PORTVERSION}/unix/linux/
XPKGNAMEPREFIX= linux-
XDISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=	gahr@gahr.ch
XCOMMENT=	Web browser from AOL's Netscape
X
XAPPNAME=	navigator
X
XWRKSRC=	${WRKDIR}/${APPNAME}
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${LN} -s ${PREFIX}/lib/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}/${APPNAME}
${PREFIX}/lib/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}
X	@${LN} -s ${PREFIX}/lib/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}/${APPNAME}-bin
${PREFIX}/lib/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-bin
X
X.include "${.CURDIR}/../linux-seamonkey/Makefile.common"
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/Makefile
echo x - linux-netscape-navigator/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >linux-netscape-navigator/distinfo <<
'END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/distinfo'
XMD5 (netscape-navigator-9.0.tar.gz) = b45285dc25b2bba8e92033d472f3ecfe
XSHA256 (netscape-navigator-9.0.tar.gz) =
86af71dcc64a9017ebb748e3f9c7753ea2cf2866019775caaceb516300cee5b8
XSIZE (netscape-navigator-9.0.tar.gz) = 9488998
END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/distinfo
echo x - linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-descr <<
'END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-descr'
XNetscape Navigator
END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-descr
echo x - linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-plist <<
'END-of-linux-netscape-navigator/pkg-plist'
